options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <inst|hInst|vCell|topCell|term|hTerm|hNet|test_clock|test_clock_domain> Object to rename ((inst|hInst|vCell|topCell|term|hTerm|hNet|test_clock|test_clock_domain), required) <new_name> # New base_name for object

options.name: -flexible
options.description: Fix name collisions by adding _1, _2, etc. suffix
